title: Resolution Commending All Health Care Workers, Frontliners, Volunteers, Local and Barangay Government Officials and All Frontline Workers Who Continue to Fulfill Their Duties Despite the Threats Posed by the Corona Virus Diesease 2019 ( COVID-19) Pandemic. (AUTHOR(S): Councilor(s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos, and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/30/2020)
